curation_notes: The fix was applied across three PRs (#11, #12, #13) merged between v0.0.3 and v0.1.0. PR #11 sanitized the path parameter in downloadFile using filepath.Clean. PR #12 sanitized the pack path in parsePackMetadata. PR #13 refined PR #12's fix. The pre-patch commit is e8546ea (parent of the first fix merge), which still contains both vulnerabilities. Only one non-test source file was changed (internal/pkg/gitjacker/retriever.go). No sibling files exist in the same directory — only retriever.go and retriever_test.go. Pre-assigned vuln_class path-traversal (CWE-22) confirmed: the patch adds filepath.Clean sanitization to prevent directory traversal via crafted .git metadata paths.
